title: TSGG Reference Implementation
description: Reference implementation and reproduction package for Trusted Safety State Governance Graphs (TSGG): a governance-aware software trace architecture for auditable human-AI systems. The release includes the Python package (dualexis), documented reproduction commands, synthetic benchmark scenarios, leakage-audit scripts, and evaluation documentation.

creators.name: Moncunill, David Martín
creators.affiliation: CRIA-BDHS Research Group, Higher Polytechnic School of Technology and Science, Universidad Camilo José Cela, Madrid, Spain

creators.name: Andrés, César
creators.affiliation: CRIA-BDHS Research Group, Higher Polytechnic School of Technology and Science, Universidad Camilo José Cela, Madrid, Spain

notes: Reproduction package companion to the SN Computer Science TSGG manuscript. Cite https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20499184 together with the published paper when available.
